
```{r}
# =======================
# PACKAGES
# =======================
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(pracma)
library(tibble)
```

```{r}

# =======================
# INPUT / OUTPUT
# =======================
file <- "input_files/boiled_sel_made.csv"
out_dir <- "output/boiled_self_made"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# =======================
# READ DATA
# Required columns:
#   Draxin
#   Absorbance
#   Condition
#   Experiment
#   Replicate
# =======================
df <- read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  rename_with(~ gsub("\\s+", "_", .x)) %>%
  mutate(
    Draxin     = as.numeric(Draxin),
    Absorbance = as.numeric(Absorbance),
    Condition  = as.character(Condition),
    Experiment = as.character(Experiment),
    Replicate  = as.character(Replicate)
  )

# =======================
# BASIC DATA CHECK
# =======================
cat("\n=======================\n")
cat("DATA STRUCTURE CHECK\n")
cat("=======================\n\n")

cat("Column names:\n")
print(names(df))

cat("\nStructure:\n")
str(df)

cat("\nMissing values per column:\n")
print(colSums(is.na(df)))

cat("\nUnique Condition values:\n")
print(sort(unique(df$Condition)))

cat("\nUnique Draxin values:\n")
print(sort(unique(df$Draxin)))

cat("\nNumber of levels:\n")
df %>%
  summarise(
    n_conditions  = n_distinct(Condition),
    n_draxin      = n_distinct(Draxin),
    n_experiments = n_distinct(Experiment),
    n_replicates  = n_distinct(paste(Experiment, Replicate, sep = "__"))
  ) %>%
  print()

cat("\nCounts per Condition x Draxin:\n")
df %>%
  count(Condition, Draxin) %>%
  arrange(Condition, Draxin) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

cat("\nCounts per Experiment x Condition x Draxin:\n")
df %>%
  count(Experiment, Condition, Draxin) %>%
  arrange(Experiment, Condition, Draxin) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

write_csv(
  df %>% count(Condition, Draxin),
  file.path(out_dir, "check_counts_condition_draxin.csv")
)

write_csv(
  df %>% count(Experiment, Condition, Draxin),
  file.path(out_dir, "check_counts_experiment_condition_draxin.csv")
)

# =======================
# CLEAN FACTOR LEVELS
# =======================
condition_order <- c("control_protein", "commercial", "wild_type", "mutant", "boiled")

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Condition = factor(Condition, levels = condition_order),
    Draxin_f  = factor(Draxin, levels = sort(unique(Draxin))),
    ExpRep    = interaction(Experiment, Replicate, drop = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Condition))

if (!("control_protein" %in% levels(droplevels(df$Condition)))) {
  stop("Condition 'control_protein' not found in the data.")
}
```

```{r}
# =======================
# RAW SUMMARY
# =======================
summary_raw <- df %>%
  group_by(Condition, Draxin) %>%
  summarise(
    n        = n(),
    mean_raw = mean(Absorbance, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_raw   = sd(Absorbance, na.rm = TRUE),
    sem_raw  = sd_raw / sqrt(n),
    .groups  = "drop"
  )

write_csv(summary_raw, file.path(out_dir, "summary_raw.csv"))

# =======================
# NORMALIZATION
# Normalize within each Condition + Experiment
# to mean of Draxin == 0
# =======================
baseline_tbl <- df %>%
  filter(Draxin == 0) %>%
  group_by(Condition, Experiment) %>%
  summarise(
    baseline_0 = mean(Absorbance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

df_norm <- df %>%
  left_join(baseline_tbl, by = c("Condition", "Experiment")) %>%
  mutate(
    Abs_norm = Absorbance / baseline_0
  )

cat("\nRows with missing baseline after normalization join:\n")
print(sum(is.na(df_norm$baseline_0)))

if (any(is.na(df_norm$baseline_0))) {
  warning("Some rows could not be normalized because no Draxin == 0 baseline was found for that Condition + Experiment.")
}

write_csv(df_norm, file.path(out_dir, "data_with_normalization.csv"))
```

```{r}
# =======================
# SUMMARY FOR NORMALIZED DATA
# =======================
summary_norm <- df_norm %>%
  group_by(Condition, Draxin) %>%
  summarise(
    n         = n(),
    mean_norm = mean(Abs_norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_norm   = sd(Abs_norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    sem_norm  = sd_norm / sqrt(n),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

write_csv(summary_norm, file.path(out_dir, "summary_normalized.csv"))

# =======================
# PLOT NORMALIZED DOSE RESPONSE
# LOG SCALE ONLY
# Exclude Draxin == 0 because log(0) is undefined
# =======================
p_norm_log <- ggplot(
  summary_norm %>% filter(Draxin > 0),
  aes(x = Draxin, y = mean_norm, group = Condition, color = Condition)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_norm - sem_norm,
        ymax = mean_norm + sem_norm),
    width = 0.08
  ) +
  scale_x_log10(breaks = sort(unique(summary_norm$Draxin[summary_norm$Draxin > 0]))) +
  labs(
    x = "Draxin (log scale)",
    y = "Normalized absorbance\n(relative to mean 0 Draxin within Condition + Experiment)",
    title = "Normalized dose-response by condition"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "plot_normalized_log_scale.png"),
  plot = p_norm_log, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# PRIMARY MIXED MODEL ON RAW DATA
# =======================
m_raw <- lmer(
  Absorbance ~ Draxin_f * Condition + (1 | Experiment),
  data = df
)

cat("\n=======================\n")
cat("MIXED MODEL ON RAW DATA\n")
cat("=======================\n\n")
print(anova(m_raw))

anova_raw <- as.data.frame(anova(m_raw)) %>%
  rownames_to_column("term") %>%
  rename(
    df_num  = NumDF,
    df_den  = DenDF,
    F_value = `F value`,
    p_value = `Pr(>F)`
  )

write_csv(anova_raw, file.path(out_dir, "anova_mixed_model_raw.csv"))

# =======================
# POSTHOC:
# Compare each Condition vs control_protein
# within each Draxin concentration
# =======================
emm_cond_within_dose <- emmeans(m_raw, ~ Condition | Draxin_f)

posthoc_vs_control_by_dose <- contrast(
  emm_cond_within_dose,
  method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
  ref = "control_protein",
  adjust = "BH"
) %>%
  as.data.frame()

write_csv(
  posthoc_vs_control_by_dose,
  file.path(out_dir, "posthoc_vs_control_protein_within_each_draxin_BH.csv")
)

# =======================
# AUC ON NORMALIZED DATA
# Average within Experiment + Condition + Replicate + Draxin
# then compute AUC per replicate profile
# =======================
auc_input <- df_norm %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Condition, Replicate, Draxin) %>%
  summarise(
    Abs_norm = mean(Abs_norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

auc_tbl <- auc_input %>%
  arrange(Experiment, Condition, Replicate, Draxin) %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Condition, Replicate) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC_norm = trapz(Draxin, Abs_norm),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write_csv(auc_tbl, file.path(out_dir, "auc_normalized_per_replicate.csv"))

# =======================
# MIXED MODEL ON NORMALIZED AUC
# =======================
m_auc <- lmer(
  AUC_norm ~ Condition + (1 | Experiment),
  data = auc_tbl
)

cat("\n=======================\n")
cat("MIXED MODEL ON NORMALIZED AUC\n")
cat("=======================\n\n")
print(anova(m_auc))

anova_auc <- as.data.frame(anova(m_auc)) %>%
  rownames_to_column("term") %>%
  rename(
    df_num  = NumDF,
    df_den  = DenDF,
    F_value = `F value`,
    p_value = `Pr(>F)`
  )

write_csv(anova_auc, file.path(out_dir, "anova_auc_normalized.csv"))

# =======================
# AUC POSTHOC:
# Compare each Condition vs control_protein only
# =======================
emm_auc <- emmeans(m_auc, ~ Condition)

auc_vs_control <- contrast(
  emm_auc,
  method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
  ref = "control_protein",
  adjust = "BH"
) %>%
  as.data.frame()

write_csv(
  auc_vs_control,
  file.path(out_dir, "posthoc_auc_vs_control_protein_BH.csv")
)

# =======================
# PLOT AUC
# =======================
auc_summary <- auc_tbl %>%
  group_by(Condition) %>%
  summarise(
    n        = n(),
    mean_auc = mean(AUC_norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_auc   = sd(AUC_norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    sem_auc  = sd_auc / sqrt(n),
    .groups  = "drop"
  )

p_auc <- ggplot(auc_tbl, aes(x = Condition, y = AUC_norm, color = Condition)) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.1, height = 0), size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_point(data = auc_summary, aes(x = Condition, y = mean_auc), size = 3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = auc_summary,
    aes(x = Condition, ymin = mean_auc - sem_auc, ymax = mean_auc + sem_auc),
    width = 0.15,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Condition",
    y = "Normalized AUC",
    title = "AUC of normalized dose-response curves"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "plot_auc_normalized.png"),
  plot = p_auc, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300
)

# =======================
# SAVE MODEL SUMMARIES AS TEXT
# =======================
capture.output(summary(m_raw), file = file.path(out_dir, "model_summary_raw.txt"))
capture.output(summary(m_auc), file = file.path(out_dir, "model_summary_auc.txt"))

cat("\nAnalysis complete.\n")
cat("Outputs saved in: ", out_dir, "\n")
```
